---
title: "Simulation of IHPP for Wiebull intensity function"
author: "4 MA"
date: "2025/2026"

output: html
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

# Generative Function

```{r simulPPh}
simulHPP <- function(lambda, Tmax) {
  N <- rpois(1, lambda * Tmax)
  U <- runif(N, 0, Tmax)
  return(sort(U))
}
```

```{r plot.PP}
plot.PP<- function(PP)
{
# plot the counting process (with jumps of size 1 (starting at point (0,0))):
plot(c(0,PP),0:length(PP),type="s",xlab="time t",ylab="number of events by time t")
# add the arrival times on the horizontal axis:
points(PP,0*PP,type="p",pch=16)
# link arrival times with the counts:
lines(PP,0:(length(PP)-1),type="h",lty=2)
}
```

```{r simulPPi}
simulPPi = function(lambda_fct,Tmax,M)
{
  M= lambda_fct(Tmax)
  res = NULL
  PPh <- simulHPP(M, Tmax)
  U <- runif(length(PPh),0,M)
  for (i in 1:length(PPh)){
    if (U[i]< lambda_fct(PPh[i]))
      {
      res <- append(res, PPh[i])
    }
  }
    return(sort(res))
  }
```

# Inhomogeneous Poisson processes With Weibull Intensity

### NHPP Simulation

```{r simu, warning=TRUE}

Weibull_I <- function(x, beta, theta) {
  return((beta/theta) * (x/theta)^(beta-1))
} 


simulWeibull <- function(beta, theta, Tmax) {
  f <- function(t) (beta/theta) * (t/theta)^(beta-1)
  
  M_val <- f(Tmax)
  
  return(simulPPi(f, Tmax, M_val))
}
Tmax=100




```

## SImulation and plot

```{r plot}
Beta_val <- 1.5 
Theta_val <- 1
Tmax_val <- 100
PPSimu <- simulWeibull(Beta_val,Theta_val, Tmax_val)

par(mfrow=c(1,2))
plot.PP(PPSimu)
curve(Weibull_I(x, Beta_val, Theta_val), 
      from = 0, to = Tmax_val, 
      col = "red", lwd = 2, 
      main = "")

```

# Statistical Test

## Crow

```{r teststat}

testCrow <- function(PP, Tmax, silent = FALSE)
{
  n <- length(PP)
  
  stat_test_Obs = 2 * sum(log(Tmax / PP)) 
  
  p_value <- pchisq(stat_test_Obs, 2 * n)
  
  if (!silent) {
    print(paste("The Observed Crow Statistic is : ", stat_test_Obs))
    print(paste("The p-value : ", p_value))
    
    if (p_value < 0.05) {
      print("Conclusion: we reject H0 at level 5%, Beta is greater than 1")
    } else {
      print("Conclusion: we do not reject H0 at level 5%, Beta could be 1")
    }
  }

  return(p_value)
}





```

## Barlow

```{r}

testBarlow <- function(PP, Tmax, silent = FALSE)
{
  n = length(PP)
  if (n < 4) return(NA) 
  
  d = floor(n/2)
  
  stat_test_Obs = ((n - d) * PP[d]) / (d * (PP[n] - PP[d]))
  
  p_value <- 1 - pf(stat_test_Obs, 2 * d, 2 * (n - d))
  
  if (!silent) {
    print(paste("The Observed test Statistic is : ", stat_test_Obs))
    print(paste("The p-value : ", p_value))
    
    if (p_value < 0.05) {
      print("Conclusion: we reject H0 at level 5%, Beta is greater than 1")
    } else {
      print("Conclusion: we do not reject H0 at level 5%, data suggests Beta could be 1")
    }
  }

  return(p_value)
}

```

```{r, test execution}
print("------Barlow------")
testBarlow(PPSimu,Tmax)

print("------Crow------")
testCrow(PPSimu,Tmax)

```

# Power Comparaison

```{r, power}
plot_puissance <- function(Tmax, liste_beta, nsimu) {
  plot(NULL, xlim=range(liste_beta), ylim=c(0,1), 
       xlab="Beta", ylab="Power",
       main="Crow vs Barlow")
  
  abline(h=0.05, col="red", lty=2)

  for(b in liste_beta) {
    
    rejet_crow = 0
    rejet_barlow = 0
    
    for(i in 1:nsimu) {
      donnees <- simulWeibull(beta = b, theta = 1, Tmax = Tmax)
      
      p_c <- testCrow(donnees, Tmax, silent = TRUE)
      p_b <- testBarlow(donnees, Tmax, silent = TRUE)
      
      if(p_c < 0.05) rejet_crow = rejet_crow + 1
      if(p_b < 0.05) rejet_barlow = rejet_barlow + 1
    }
    
    puissance_C = rejet_crow / nsimu
    puissance_B = rejet_barlow / nsimu
    
    points(b, puissance_C, col="blue", pch=20) 
    points(b, puissance_B, col="red", pch=20) 
  }
  
  legend("topright", legend=c("Crow", "Barlow"), col=c("blue", "red"), pch=c(20, 20))
}
```

```{r}
betas_test <- c(seq(1, 1.35, by = 0.01))
plot_puissance(Tmax = 200, betas_test, 200)
```

```{r}
betas_test <- c(seq(1, 1.1, by = 0.001))
plot_puissance(Tmax = 200, betas_test, 200)
```
